title: Merits by Power
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM PowerplayCollect WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT Power AS label, SUM(Count) AS value FROM PowerplayCollect WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY Power UNION ALL SELECT Power AS label, SUM(Count) AS value FROM PowerplayDeliver WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY Power ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {total} merit collection event(s) logged during the report period. For commanders who have served multiple Powers, this chart reveals the true distribution of political work — loyalty is easy to claim, but the merit data shows where the effort actually went.
details.help: Combines PowerplayCollect and PowerplayDeliver grouped by Power to show which Power received the most operational support. total is a secondary count for context.

tagLines: Powerplay merit distribution by faction compiled. Political contribution audit complete.
You served the Power. The merit data shows exactly how much, and for whom, if there was ever a question.
Some commanders hedge their political bets. This chart shows whether you did the same.
